moments.title: World Cup Knockout Stage Continues
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout stage is in full swing today, June 30th, with major matches including France vs. Sweden and Mexico vs. Ecuador.

angles.name: Today's Big Games
angles.copy: World Cup knockout football today! Who are you backing in France vs Sweden and Mexico vs Ecuador? Let the drama unfold!

angles.name: England's Next Challenge
angles.copy: England are in action tomorrow against DR Congo in the World Cup Round of 32! Feeling confident? #ThreeLions

moments.title: Happy Birthday Post Malone!
moments.blurb: American singer, rapper, and songwriter Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Turning 31 this week! Happy Birthday to the one and only Post Malone on July 4th. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Posty's Hits
angles.copy: From 'Circles' to 'Sunflower', Post Malone brings the vibes. Wishing him a big happy 31st birthday this Thursday!

moments.title: Remembering Bill Withers
moments.blurb: Soul and R&B legend Bill Withers, known for hits like 'Lean on Me' and 'Lovely Day', would have been 88 on July 4th.

angles.name: Soulful Tribute
angles.copy: On July 4th, we remember the incredible Bill Withers, who would have been 88. His music still lifts us up. #BillWithers

angles.name: Timeless Tracks
angles.copy: From 'Ain't No Sunshine' to 'Lovely Day', Bill Withers' legacy lives on. Remembering him on what would have been his 88th birthday.

moments.title: Happy 86th Birthday Ringo Starr!
moments.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7th.

angles.name: Drummer's Day
angles.copy: Peace and Love! Wishing a very Happy 86th Birthday to the iconic Ringo Starr on July 7th. What's your favourite Beatles track featuring Ringo?

angles.name: Legendary Beatle
angles.copy: Still making music and spreading good vibes! Happy 86th to Ringo Starr this Monday. A true music legend.

moments.title: Summer Holidays Begin for Some
moments.blurb: As June ends and July begins, many schools across the UK start to break up for the long summer holidays.

angles.name: School's Out!
angles.copy: That's it for another school year for some! Are your kids officially on summer holidays? What are your plans?

angles.name: Holiday Vibes
angles.copy: The great escape begins! Wishing everyone starting their summer holidays a fantastic time. Where are you off to (or staying put)?
